message:
fix(pager): make page buffer pool size configurable, increase default to 1GB

The previous hardcoded max_buffers=65,536 (256MB at 4KB page size)
caused FrankenError::OutOfMemory on multi-GB databases with several
indexed tables during normal INSERT transactions.

- Increase DEFAULT_PAGE_BUFFER_MAX from 65,536 to 262,144 (1GB)
- Add resolve_page_buffer_max() with 3-tier resolution: explicit param,
  FSQLITE_PAGE_BUFFER_MAX env var, then default constant
- Add open_with_cx_and_page_buffer_max() and
  open_readonly_with_cx_and_page_buffer_max() public APIs
- Add ShardedPageCache::with_max_buffers() constructor

Fixes #57

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
